title: Ghost vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Mailgun?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
